preamble.title: socialefintech/sociale-sc
preamble.description: Aiken smart contracts for the Sociale platform

audit_anchor/types/AnchorAction.title: AnchorAction
audit_anchor/types/AnchorAction.description: Redeemer actions for the audit anchor validator

anyOf.title: Anchor
anyOf.description: Submit a new Merkle root anchor for a cooperative's transaction batch

anyOf.title: RotateOperator
anyOf.description: Transfer operator authority to a new key (e.g. key rotation)

audit_anchor/types/AnchorDatum.title: AnchorDatum
audit_anchor/types/AnchorDatum.description:
On-chain state stored at the audit anchor script address.
 One UTxO per cooperative, identified by cooperative_id.

fields.title: operator
fields.description: Sociale platform key authorised to submit anchors for this cooperative

fields.title: cooperative_id
fields.description: Cooperative identifier — matches the platform's internal tenant record

fields.title: last_anchor_time
fields.description: POSIX timestamp (milliseconds) of the most recent anchor submission

fields.title: anchor_count
fields.description: Cumulative count of anchor submissions — aids off-chain chain validation

fields.title: last_record_hash
fields.description: Hash of the most recent AnchorRecord, chaining the anchor history

audit_anchor/types/AnchorRecord.title: AnchorRecord
audit_anchor/types/AnchorRecord.description: An individual anchor record, supplied in the redeemer when submitting a batch.

fields.title: merkle_root
fields.description: SHA-256 Merkle root of the transaction batch

fields.title: batch_start
fields.description: Start of the batch window — POSIX milliseconds, inclusive

fields.title: batch_end
fields.description: End of the batch window — POSIX milliseconds, inclusive

fields.title: tx_count
fields.description: Number of transactions included in this batch

fields.title: prev_record_hash
fields.description: Hash of the previous AnchorRecord — links the chain for gap detection

cardano/transaction/OutputReference.title: OutputReference
cardano/transaction/OutputReference.description:
An `OutputReference` is a unique reference to an output on-chain. The `output_index`
 corresponds to the position in the output list of the transaction (identified by its id)
 that produced that output

fields.title: creation_time
fields.description: POSIX timestamp (ms) when the cooperative was created on-chain

fields.title: join_time
fields.description: POSIX timestamp (ms) when the member joined

fields.title: nft_token_name
fields.description: Token name of this member's identity NFT

fields.title: keri_aid
fields.description: Optional KERI Autonomic Identifier — links on-chain identity to the KERI identity layer

entity_registry/types/MemberStatus.title: MemberStatus
entity_registry/types/MemberStatus.description: Lifecycle status of a cooperative member

entity_registry/types/RegistryAction.title: RegistryAction
entity_registry/types/RegistryAction.description: Redeemer actions for the entity registry validator

entity_registry/types/RegistryDatum.title: RegistryDatum
entity_registry/types/RegistryDatum.description:
On-chain state for a cooperative entity.
 Each cooperative is a separate UTxO at the entity registry script address.

fields.title: admins
fields.description: Ordered list of authorised administrator verification key hashes

fields.title: member_count
fields.description: Current member count — used to evaluate quorum (total_votes * 100 >= quorum_percentage * member_count)

fields.title: admins
fields.description: Verification key hashes authorised to update governance parameters

fields.title: approval_threshold
fields.description: Minimum percentage of for-votes required to approve (0-100)

fields.title: minimum_voting_period
fields.description: Minimum voting window in milliseconds

fields.title: quorum_percentage
fields.description: Minimum percentage of members that must vote for a result to be valid (0-100)

fields.title: creation_time
fields.description: POSIX timestamp (ms) when the proposal was submitted

fields.title: voting_deadline
fields.description: POSIX timestamp (ms) after which no new votes are accepted

member_nft/types/MembershipLevel.title: MembershipLevel
member_nft/types/MembershipLevel.description: Membership tier, used as metadata in the NFT and for governance weight

member_nft/types/MintAction.title: MintAction
member_nft/types/MintAction.description: Redeemer actions for the member NFT minting policy

anyOf.title: MintMember
anyOf.description: Mint a member identity NFT — must be atomic with an entity registry spend

anyOf.title: BurnMember
anyOf.description: Burn a member NFT on member removal
